text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is taking extra home economics
lessons. Intrigued by the unusual situation, I go to
check on her.

I find her and Sakura Bakushin O using sewing
machines to create what seem to be drawstring
pouches.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sewing machine halted. Confirming the ninth
instance of frayed threads.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I have determined that rectifying the situation
will take approximately fifteen minutes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What the?! I sewed the opening shut again! Why's
this so hard?! Give me a break...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This has to be some kinda test from a higher
power! That's right—it's a test for me, the
gorgeous class representative!

There are piles of failed pouches everywhere, and
they're both working up a sweat. They're not
having an easy time with this.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Trainer. Indeed, this mission is more
difficult than I predicted in my initial analysis.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, if I cannot complete this task today,
then I face the possibility of another extra class
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing repairs immediately. Perhaps if I
remove this thread...
Snap!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Aieee?! What just happened?! What was that
horrible sound?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...The top and bobbin threads have snapped.
Repair method unknown. Status—"despair."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Looks like you got a little careless! Very well then, I'll allow you to use my renowned sewing machine!

Sakura Bakushin O beams with pride and
vigorously yanks some material out of her sewing
machine.
Snap!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GAH! My needle! It broooke!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Status—"hopeless."

Even Mihono Bourbon looks understandably
perplexed by the unexpected turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Taking a break in order to
achieve relaxation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the sakura mochi was so chewy! It's got my
name in it, so no wonder it's good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, there's a really famous
proverb about mochi!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's, um... uh... Mochi... blotchy... mochi?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Are you referring to "buy mochi from mochi
makers," meaning "leave it to the experts"?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, that one! It was right on the tip of my
tongue!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's the matter, Bourbon? Is there
something on my face?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Status—"inspired."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Leave the mochi to the mochi makers
and the sewing machines to the... sewing
ma—meh! Let's just ask the teacher!

text_block_list.name: Home Economics Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Hey, less talking, more sewing. ...You're doing
well, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

After the teacher fixes their sewing machines,
they're both able to successfully finish their
pouches.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe it would be plausible for me to complete
the pouch by hand. Rapid transition to
hand-sewing mode initiated.

Mihono Bourbon then takes a needle and starts
sewing with exact precision and speed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Complete.

She finishes the pouch with completely uniform
stitching. It's hard to believe it's handmade!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... Mark my words, I won't let you upstage the
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll complete my pouch using all nineteen different
hand-sewing methods described in our textbook!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There! Running stitch! Back stitch! Cross stitch!
Bakushin, Bakushiiiiin!

One way or another, Bakushin O is also able to
finish her hand-sewn pouch, but...

text_block_list.name: Home Economics Teacher
text_block_list.text: Did you make this by hand?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We encountered difficulties using the
machines, so manual sewing proved optimal.

text_block_list.name: Home Economics Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Normally, this is grounds for failure, but given
how uniform this stitching is, and how many
methods have been used here, I'm impressed.

text_block_list.name: Home Economics Teacher
text_block_list.text: So, you both pass.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hah hah hah hah! But of course I passed! I'm the very image of a role model, the class rep-re-sen-ta-tive!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Teacher.

They both manage to pass the extra class in the
end, despite the issues they encountered along
the way.
